description: This source file is an HTML document that defines the user interface for a database visualizer or viewer app. It contains the structure, styling, and embedded JavaScript code for browsing databases, tables, and data display with interactive functionalities.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches and displays the list of available databases in the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the list of databases and resets selections.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses a database to show tables and loads table data when selected.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches and displays tables for a specific database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Loads and displays data for a selected table, handling large data sets and empty states.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Constructs and inserts an HTML table to display fetched data.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Renders individual table cell content, including handling of objects, nulls, and long strings.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Handles expanding/collapsing cell content for long strings and objects.

methods.name: showLoading
methods.description: Displays a loading indicator within a specified element.

methods.name: showError
methods.description: Displays an error message within a specified element.

methods.name: showEmptyState
methods.description: Displays an empty state message when no data is available or selected.

methods.name: setActiveState
methods.description: Highlights the selected item in the UI.
